markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 2. Drivers’ Licenses
##### § 42-2-310 — Violation

Any person who violates any of the provisions of this part 3 commits a petty offense, pursuant to section 18-1.3-503 .

subsections.text: Any person who violates any of the provisions of this part 3 commits a petty offense, pursuant to section 18-1.3-503 .
